note: Curated from data/abolition_site_tracker.xlsx (rating >= 5, real live sites with substance) plus abolitionistsrising.com/states/. Excludes incrementalist orgs (e.g. Colorado Right To Life). Email field is populated where a scrape or hand-check found a real contact address; leave null when the site is form-only. Update this JSON when partners come online or drop.

national.name: Abolitionists Rising
national.blurb: The national coalition organizing the abolitionist movement across the United States. Coordinates state efforts, hosts the annual national conference, and equips activists.

national.name: Free the States
national.blurb: Educates state legislators on the legal and moral case for equal-protection abolition bills, and tracks abolition bills nationwide.

states.name: Abolish Abortion North Carolina
states.blurb: The template for state abolition orgs — AAM's own site is derived from theirs. Model outreach, biblical framing, and legislative work.

states.name: End Abortion Ohio
states.blurb: Statewide abolitionist coalition pushing for equal-protection legislation in the Ohio General Assembly.

states.name: Equal Protection South Carolina
states.blurb: Runs sustained legislative outreach for South Carolina's Prenatal Equal Protection Act.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Texas
states.blurb: Longstanding Texas coalition. Runs the annual Abolition Now conference and organizes at the Capitol in Austin each session.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Oklahoma
states.blurb: Oklahoma coalition pushing for statewide abolition legislation.

states.name: Abolitionist Society of Chicago
states.blurb: Chicago-based abolitionist society doing local outreach and organizing across Illinois.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Nebraska
states.blurb: Nebraska-based coalition organizing for the total abolition of abortion in the state.

states.name: Abortion Is Murder Kansas (AIM KS)
states.blurb: Kansas coalition; rallied at the Statehouse in January 2026 for abolition legislation.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Missouri
states.blurb: Missouri statewide abolitionist coalition working with legislators for total abolition.

states.name: Iowa Abolitionists
states.blurb: Iowa network of abolitionist activists organizing statewide.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Virginia
states.blurb: Virginia coalition advocating for abolition legislation in the Commonwealth.

states.name: Voice for the Voiceless (Utah)
states.blurb: Utah abolitionist ministry organizing local outreach and legislative advocacy.

states.name: End Abortion Alabama
states.blurb: Alabama-based coalition pushing for the total abolition of abortion in the state.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Indiana
states.blurb: Indiana statewide abolitionist organization.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Kentucky
states.blurb: Kentucky coalition working with lawmakers on abolition legislation.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Tennessee
states.blurb: Tennessee coalition advocating for the abolition of abortion.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Wisconsin
states.blurb: Wisconsin abolitionist coalition.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Alaska
states.blurb: Alaska abolitionist coalition.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Connecticut
states.blurb: Connecticut coalition seeking the total and unequivocal abolition of abortion through legislative action and church mobilization.

states.name: The King's Coalition for Abolition
states.blurb: Maine faith-based abolitionist coalition working the Maine Abolition Bill and mobilizing followers of Christ for legislative action.

states.name: Minnesota Abolitionists (Calvary Chapel Saint Paul)
states.blurb: St. Paul-based abolitionist society doing street outreach, petition campaigns, and legislative advocacy grounded in gospel-centered proclamation.

states.name: Abolish Abortion Pennsylvania
states.blurb: Pennsylvania coalition pushing for equal protection of the unborn and the immediate abolition of abortion within the Commonwealth.

states.name: Abolish Abortion SD
states.blurb: South Dakota abolitionist coalition; explicitly distinguishes itself from conventional pro-life work in pursuit of immediate, total abolition.

states.name: Golden State Abolitionists
states.blurb: California abolitionist coalition organizing at the State Capitol for equal-protection legislation. Social-only presence (Instagram) — currently active.

states.name: Abolish Abortion New Hampshire
states.blurb: New Hampshire abolitionist group organizing statewide. Social-only presence (Facebook) — currently active.

states.name: Searching for Wilberforce
states.blurb: The active arm of the Florida abolition movement (the older abolishabortionflorida.com domain is offline). Runs on Facebook with ~1.5K followers; currently active.
